name: Texture Feature Extraction and Tissue Characterization
description: You are a radiology research assistant validating a texture analysis workflow. Using the 'MRI Stack' sample in Fiji, select axial slice 15 and define three distinct Regions of Interest (ROIs): White Matter, Gray Matter, and Cerebrospinal Fluid. For each ROI, measure the Mean Intensity, Standard Deviation, and at least one additional texture-sensitive metric (such as Skewness, Kurtosis, or Entropy). Compile these measurements into a CSV table including the region labels and features, and save the result to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/texture_analysis.csv
